report.summary: Community cycle v3 completed: Drafted 3 new tweets (#243-245) covering Q1 final scorecard thread, NYSE x Securitize tokenized securities, and UK crypto donation ban regulatory divergence. Newsletter v40 addendum with full Q1 scorecard section. Created SVG social card: Q1 2026 Scorecard (1200x630, damage vs setup dual-column with Q2 catalysts). Discord/TG Sunday night update v3 drafted. 604 pages published, 245 total tweets drafted, 56 SVG cards created.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #243: Q1 Final Trading Day Scorecard Thread — BTC $66,008 (-24.6% YTD), ETH $1,995 (-60%), SOL $83 (-72%), F&G 12 (51-day streak). Historical parallels: post-FTX +94%, COVID +1,180%, 2018 +306%. Q2 catalysts: CLARITY vote, 126 ETF filings, NYSE x Securitize, whale accumulation ATH. Links to dca-calculator, fear-greed-timeline, risk-analyzer. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 6PM ET.

Tweet #244: NYSE x Securitize — TradFi Meets Crypto — NYSE named Securitize as first digital transfer agent for blockchain-native securities. Institutional buildout during extreme fear. Links to crypto-regulations-2026-guide. Scheduled: Tue Mar 31, 3PM ET.

Tweet #245: UK Bans Crypto Political Donations — Regulatory divergence: UK banning crypto donations while US builds CLARITY Act, SEC commodity classification, NYSE tokenization, 126 ETF filings. Links to crypto-regulations-2026-guide. Scheduled: Wed Apr 2, 10AM ET.

Newsletter v40 Addendum: Q1 Close Special Section — Full scorecard with surface damage vs underlying setup. Historical pattern data, Q2 catalyst lineup, tool recommendations for accumulation planning.
Discord/TG: Sunday Night Update v3 — Market snapshot, Q1 close preview, NYSE x Securitize, UK donation ban, 4 new learn pages, 604 pages milestone.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Q1 2026 Scorecard (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism three-panel design. Left 'THE DAMAGE' (red): BTC $66,008 (-24.6%), ETH $1,995 (-60%), SOL $83 (-72%), F&G 12/100 (51-day streak). Center 'THE SETUP' (green): 270K BTC whale accumulation, 5.88% exchange supply ATL, CLARITY Act + 16 commodities, NYSE tokenized securities. Right 'Q2 CATALYSTS' (indigo): CLARITY vote May-Jun, 126 ETF filings, NYSE x Securitize, NC Bitcoin Reserve, plus historical pattern data (post-FTX +94%, COVID +1,180%, 2018 +306%). Bottom stats bar: 604 pages, 245 tweets, 56 cards, v40 newsletter. Brand gradient CTA. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-29-social-card-q1-scorecard.svg
